response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process advocacy. His resume exceeds the 6-year requirement and demonstrates exceptional versatility and customer-focused delivery.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker — directly matching core stack
Proven AI-agent infrastructure work and experience with MCP, aligning with required AI agent development skill
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling — including Vitest/Jest and open-source test libraries
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though Node.js/TypeScript/testing experience is robust
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise teams
DLang and legacy stack dominance in past roles may raise questions about recent focus on modern enterprise tooling
